content.content:
1→# ============================================================
     2→# lxd/Makefile — 인프라 전용 (dorae222/hj 서버에서만 실행)
     3→# 사용법: make -f lxd/Makefile <target>
     4→# ============================================================
     5→
     6→ROOT := $(realpath $(dir $(lastword $(MAKEFILE_LIST)))..)
     7→REGISTRY ?= dorae222
     8→TAG ?= latest
     9→
    10→.PHONY: help push push-local deploy-test deploy-test-service \
    11→        deploy-staging health-staging \
    12→        sync-dev-branches sync-lxd sync-all \
    13→        check-lxd-git sync-dev-data health-lxd fix-lxd-jwt
    14→
    15→help:
    16→	@echo ""
    17→	@echo "  [인프라 전용] lxd/Makefile 명령어"
    18→	@echo "  실행: make -f lxd/Makefile <target>"
    19→	@echo ""
    20→	@echo "  Docker Hub 배포:"
    21→	@echo "    push                   모든 이미지 Docker Hub push"
    22→	@echo "    push-local             로컬 레지스트리(10.10.10.10:5000) push"
    23→	@echo "    deploy-test            빌드 → push → deploy-test 전체 배포"
    24→	@echo "    deploy-test-service    단일 서비스 배포 (SVC=frontend|backend-api|ai-pipeline)"
    25→	@echo "    deploy-staging         test-server(10.10.10.19) staging 배포"
    26→	@echo "    health-staging         test-server 헬스체크"
    27→	@echo ""
    28→	@echo "  브랜치/LXD 싱크:"
    29→	@echo "    sync-dev-branches      develop → dev/* 브랜치 병합 & push"
    30→	@echo "    sync-lxd               각 LXD 서버에서 git pull 실행"
    31→	@echo "    sync-all               위 두 작업 순차 실행"
    32→	@echo ""
    33→	@echo "  LXD 개발 환경:"
    34→	@echo "    check-lxd-git          각 LXD 서버 git 설정(user/email/remote/SSH) 점검"
    35→	@echo "    health-lxd             5대 서버 git 브랜치/Docker 컨테이너 상태 한눈에 보기"
    36→	@echo "    fix-lxd-jwt            JWT_SECRET 기본값인 서버 자동 갱신 + backend-api 재시작"
    37→	@echo "    sync-dev-data          prod DB 콘텐츠 → 각 LXD 로컬 dev DB 동기화"
    38→	@echo ""
    39→	@echo "  변수:"
    40→	@echo "    REGISTRY=$(REGISTRY)  TAG=$(TAG)"
    41→	@echo ""
    42→
    43→# --- Docker Hub Push ---
    44→push:
    45→	@echo "Docker Hub($(REGISTRY)) push..."
    46→	docker push $(REGISTRY)/adelie-frontend:$(TAG)
    47→	docker push $(REGISTRY)/adelie-backend-api:$(TAG)
    48→	docker push $(REGISTRY)/adelie-ai-pipeline:$(TAG)
    49→
    50→push-local:
    51→	@for svc in frontend backend-api ai-pipeline; do \
    52→		docker tag $(REGISTRY)/adelie-$$svc:$(TAG) 10.10.10.10:5000/adelie-$$svc:$(TAG); \
    53→		docker push 10.10.10.10:5000/adelie-$$svc:$(TAG); \
    54→	done
    55→
    56→# --- Deploy-test (10.10.10.20) ---
    57→deploy-test:
    58→	$(MAKE) -C $(ROOT) build
    59→	$(MAKE) push
    60→	ssh deploy-test 'cd ~/adelie-investment && git pull origin develop && \
    61→		docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull && \
    62→		docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --remove-orphans && \
    63→		docker exec adelie-frontend nginx -s reload 2>/dev/null || true'
    64→
    65→deploy-test-service:
    66→	$(MAKE) -C $(ROOT) build-$(SVC)
    67→	docker push $(REGISTRY)/adelie-$(SVC):$(TAG)
    68→	ssh deploy-test 'cd ~/adelie-investment && git pull origin develop && \
    69→		docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull $(SVC) && \
    70→		docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d $(SVC) && \
    71→		docker exec adelie-frontend nginx -s reload 2>/dev/null || true'
    72→
    73→# --- 브랜치 싱크 (현재 git 계정 사용 — git config 강제 변경 없음) ---
    74→sync-dev-branches:
    75→	@echo "develop → dev/* 브랜치 싱크..."
    76→	@cd $(ROOT) && CURRENT=$$(git branch --show-current); \
    77→	for BRANCH in dev/frontend dev/backend dev/chatbot dev/pipeline dev/infra; do \
    78→		echo "  -> $$BRANCH"; \
    79→		git checkout $$BRANCH 2>/dev/null || { echo "  브랜치 없음, 건너뜀: $$BRANCH"; continue; }; \
    80→		git merge develop --no-edit 2>/dev/null || true; \
    81→		git push origin $$BRANCH; \
    82→	done; \
    83→	git checkout $$CURRENT
    84→	@echo "완료: 모든 dev/* 브랜치 싱크"
    85→
    86→# --- LXD 서버 코드 싱크 (lxc 명령 — 호스트에서만 동작) ---
    87→# git pull 후 frontend dev 이미지 빌드 및 up -d 포함
    88→sync-lxd:
    89→	@echo "LXD 서버 코드 싱크 (git pull → frontend build → up -d)..."
    90→	@lxc exec dev-yj99son  -- bash -c "cd /home/ubuntu/adelie-investment && git pull origin dev/frontend && \
    91→		docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml build frontend 2>&1 | tail -3 && \
    92→		docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d frontend" && echo "  ✅ dev-yj99son" || echo "  ❌ dev-yj99son"
    93→	@lxc exec dev-j2hoon10 -- bash -c "cd /home/ubuntu/adelie-investment && git pull origin dev/chatbot && \
    94→		docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml build frontend 2>&1 | tail -3 && \
    95→		docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d frontend" && echo "  ✅ dev-j2hoon10" || echo "  ❌ dev-j2hoon10"
    96→	@lxc exec dev-ryejinn  -- bash -c "cd /home/ubuntu/adelie-investment && git pull origin dev/pipeline && \
    97→		docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml build frontend 2>&1 | tail -3 && \
    98→		docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d frontend" && echo "  ✅ dev-ryejinn" || echo "  ❌ dev-ryejinn"
    99→	@lxc exec dev-jjjh02   -- bash -c "cd /home/ubuntu/adelie-investment && git pull origin dev/backend && \
   100→		docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml build frontend 2>&1 | tail -3 && \
   101→		docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d frontend" && echo "  ✅ dev-jjjh02" || echo "  ❌ dev-jjjh02"
   102→	@lxc exec dev-hj       -- bash -c "cd /home/ubuntu/adelie-investment && git pull origin dev/infra && \
   103→		docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml build frontend 2>&1 | tail -3 && \
   104→		docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d frontend" && echo "  ✅ dev-hj" || echo "  ❌ dev-hj"
   105→	@echo "완료: 모든 LXD 서버 코드 싱크"
   106→
   107→sync-all: sync-dev-branches sync-lxd
   108→	@echo "전체 싱크 완료 (브랜치 + LXD 서버)"
   109→
   110→# --- LXD 서버 git 설정 점검 ---
   111→check-lxd-git:
   112→	@echo "=== LXD 서버 git 설정 점검 ==="
   113→	@for srv in dev-yj99son dev-j2hoon10 dev-jjjh02 dev-ryejinn dev-hj; do \
   114→		echo ""; \
   115→		echo "### $$srv ###"; \
   116→		lxc exec $$srv -- bash -c " \
   117→			cd /home/ubuntu/adelie-investment 2>/dev/null || { echo '  ❌ 프로젝트 디렉토리 없음'; exit 0; }; \
   118→			REMOTE=\$$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed 's|https://[^@]*@|https://***@|g' || echo '미설정'); \
   119→			NAME=\$$(git config user.name 2>/dev/null || echo '❌ 미설정'); \
   120→			EMAIL=\$$(git config user.email 2>/dev/null || echo '❌ 미설정'); \
   121→			SSH_RESULT=\$$(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 -T git@github.com 2>&1 | grep -v '^Warning:' | head -1 || true); \
   122→			[ -z \"\$$SSH_RESULT\" ] && SSH_RESULT='❌ SSH 미인증 (공개키 GitHub 미등록)'; \
   123→			echo \"  remote : \$$REMOTE\"; \
   124→			echo \"  user   : \$$NAME <\$$EMAIL>\"; \
   125→			echo \"  ssh    : \$$SSH_RESULT\"; \
   126→		" 2>/dev/null || echo "  ❌ LXC 연결 실패"; \
   127→	done
   128→	@echo ""
   129→	@echo "=== 점검 완료 ==="
   130→
   131→# --- prod DB 콘텐츠 → 각 LXD 로컬 dev DB 동기화 ---
   132→# HOST(dev-hj)에서 실행: deploy-test prod 덤프 → 각 LXD 서버 로컬 postgres에 적용
   133→sync-dev-data:
   134→	@echo "=== deploy-test → 각 LXD 로컬 dev DB 콘텐츠 동기화 ==="
   135→	@bash $(ROOT)/database/scripts/sync_dev_data.sh
   136→	@echo "=== 동기화 완료 ==="
   137→
   138→# --- LXD 5대 서버 헬스체크 (git 브랜치 + Docker 컨테이너 상태) ---
   139→health-lxd:
   140→	@echo "=== LXD 서버 헬스체크 ==="
   141→	@for srv in dev-yj99son dev-j2hoon10 dev-jjjh02 dev-ryejinn dev-hj; do \
   142→		echo ""; \
   143→		echo "### $$srv ###"; \
   144→		lxc exec $$srv -- bash -c " \
   145→			cd /home/ubuntu/adelie-investment 2>/dev/null || { echo '  ❌ 프로젝트 디렉토리 없음'; exit 0; }; \
   146→			BRANCH=\$$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo '❓ 미확인'); \
   147→			AHEAD=\$$(git rev-list @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo '?'); \
   148→			BEHIND=\$$(git rev-list HEAD..@{u} 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo '?'); \
   149→			echo \"  브랜치  : \$$BRANCH (↑\$$AHEAD ↓\$$BEHIND)\"; \
   150→			echo '  컨테이너:'; \
   151→			docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml ps --format 'table {{.Name}}\t{{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | \
   152→				awk '{printf \"    %-35s %s\n\", \$$1, \$$2}'; \
   153→		" 2>/dev/null || echo "  ❌ LXC 연결 실패"; \
   154→	done
   155→	@echo ""
   156→	@echo "=== 헬스체크 완료 ==="
   157→
   158→# --- JWT_SECRET 기본값 서버 자동 수정 ---
   159→# .env의 JWT_SECRET이 기본값이면 새 랜덤값으로 교체 후 backend-api 재시작
   160→fix-lxd-jwt:
   161→	@echo "=== JWT_SECRET 기본값 서버 수정 ==="
   162→	@DEFAULT_JWT="narrative-invest-jwt-secret-change-in-production"; \
   163→	for srv in dev-yj99son dev-j2hoon10 dev-jjjh02 dev-ryejinn dev-hj; do \
   164→		echo ""; \
   165→		echo "### $$srv ###"; \
   166→		lxc exec $$srv -- bash -c " \
   167→			ENV_FILE=\$$(ls /home/ubuntu/adelie-investment/.env 2>/dev/null | head -1); \
   168→			[ -z \"\$$ENV_FILE\" ] && { echo '  ❌ .env 파일 없음'; exit 0; }; \
   169→			DIR=\$$(dirname \$$ENV_FILE); \
   170→			CURRENT_JWT=\$$(grep '^JWT_SECRET=' \$$ENV_FILE | cut -d= -f2-); \
   171→			if [ \"\$$CURRENT_JWT\" = 'narrative-invest-jwt-secret-change-in-production' ]; then \
   172→				NEW_JWT=\$$(openssl rand -hex 32); \
   173→				sed -i \"s|JWT_SECRET=.*|JWT_SECRET=\$$NEW_JWT|\" \$$ENV_FILE; \
   174→				echo '  🔧 JWT_SECRET 갱신 완료'; \
   175→				cd \$$DIR && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml restart backend-api 2>&1 | tail -2; \
   176→				sleep 8; \
   177→				STATUS=\$$(docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml ps backend-api --format '{{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null); \
   178→				echo \"  상태: \$$STATUS\"; \
   179→			else \
   180→				echo '  ✅ JWT_SECRET 정상 (기본값 아님)'; \
   181→			fi; \
   182→		" 2>/dev/null || echo "  ❌ LXC 연결 실패"; \
   183→	done
   184→	@echo ""
   185→	@echo "=== JWT 수정 완료 ==="
   186→
   187→# --- Staging (test-server, 10.10.10.19) ---
   188→# test.adelie-invest.com — release/feb20-stable 기준 독립 환경
   189→STAGING_TAG ?= feb20-stable
   190→
   191→deploy-staging:
   192→	@echo "=== test-server(10.10.10.19) staging 배포 ==="
   193→	lxc exec test-server -- bash -c '\
   194→		cd /root/adelie-investment && \
   195→		git pull origin release/feb20-stable && \
   196→		docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull && \
   197→		docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --remove-orphans && \
   198→		docker exec adelie-frontend nginx -s reload 2>/dev/null || true'
   199→	@echo "=== staging 배포 완료 ==="
   200→
   201→health-staging:
   202→	@echo "=== test-server(10.10.10.19) 헬스체크 ==="
   203→	@lxc exec test-server -- bash -c '\
   204→		echo "  브랜치: $$(cd /root/adelie-investment && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)"; \
   205→		echo "  컨테이너:"; \
   206→		cd /root/adelie-investment && \
   207→		docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml ps --format "table {{.Name}}\t{{.Status}}" 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | \
   208→			awk "{printf \"    %-35s %s\\n\", \$$1, \$$2}"; \
   209→		echo "  API 헬스:"; \
   210→		curl -s http://localhost:8082/api/v1/health 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo "    ❌ API 미응답"'
   211→	@echo "=== 헬스체크 완료 ==="
   212→

Very thorough exploration of the demo vs test (staging) environment distinction in the adelie-investment project.

1. Read `lxd/inventory.md` fully — find all references to deploy-test (10.10.10.20) vs test-server (10.10.10.19)
2. Read `docker-compose.prod.yml` — this is used by deploy-test
3. Check if there's a `docker-compose.staging.yml` or similar for test-server
4. Read `.github/workflows/deploy.yml` — what triggers deployment and to WHERE?
5. Check if there are other deploy workflows — `ls .github/workflows/`
6. Read `lxd/Makefile` — find `deploy-test` vs `deploy-staging` targets, understand the differences
7. Check `CLAUDE.md` for any mentions of demo.adelie-invest.com vs test.adelie-invest.com
8. Check nginx configs if any exist — `find` for nginx.conf files
9. Look at `infra/` directory structure for any Cloudflare tunnel or domain configs

Key question to answer: What is the exact deployment topology?
- demo.adelie-invest.com → deploy-test (10.10.10.20) — which branch? which images?
- test.adelie-invest.com → test-server (10.10.10.19) — which branch? which images?
- How do they differ in terms of DB, branch, Docker image tags?

content.text:
Explore the git history to understand the dev/frontend branch integration and the original plan for the canvas-agent-v4 feature.

1. Run `git log --oneline -30 develop` to see recent develop history
2. Run `git log --oneline -20 origin/dev/frontend` to see dev/frontend history  
3. Run `git log --oneline origin/feat/agent-canvas-v3-yj99son` to see the v3 branch history
4. Run `git log --all --oneline --graph -40` to visualize the branch topology
5. Check for any PR descriptions: `gh pr list --state all --limit 20` to find canvas/agent related PRs
6. Look for any plan files or docs:
   - `ls frontend/docs/` — read agent-architecture.md
   - Check `/home/hj/.claude/projects/-home-hj-2026-project-adelie-investment/` for any plan files or transcripts
   - `ls /home/hj/.claude/projects/-home-hj-2026-project-adelie-investment/*.jsonl` — check for plan transcripts
7. Run `git diff --stat origin/dev/frontend..develop` to see what changed between dev/frontend and develop
8. Run `git log --oneline --merges develop -10` to find merge commits

Key question: What was the state BEFORE dev/frontend was integrated? What was the original canvas-agent-v4 plan?

content.content:
1→# ============================================================
     2→# Adelie Investment - Frontend (React + Vite + Nginx)
     3→# ============================================================
     4→FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
     5→WORKDIR /app
     6→
     7→# 의존성 설치 (캐시 최적화)
     8→COPY package*.json ./
     9→RUN npm ci --silent
    10→
    11→# 소스 복사 + 빌드
    12→COPY . .
    13→ARG VITE_FASTAPI_URL=""
    14→RUN npm run build
    15→
    16→# ============================================================
    17→# Runtime: nginx
    18→# ============================================================
    19→FROM nginx:alpine
    20→COPY --from=builder /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html
    21→COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
    22→EXPOSE 80
    23→CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
    24→

    10→      - ./rules:/etc/prometheus/rules:ro

    13→      - --config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
    14→      - --storage.tsdb.retention.time=30d
    15→      - --web.enable-lifecycle
    16→
    17→  alertmanager:
    18→    image: prom/alertmanager:latest
    19→    container_name: adelie-alertmanager
    20→    restart: unless-stopped
    21→    ports:
    22→      - "9093:9093"
    23→    volumes:
    24→      - ./alertmanager.yml:/etc/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml
    25→      - alertmanager_data:/alertmanager
    26→    command:

    28→      - --storage.path=/alertmanager

    30→  grafana:
    31→    image: grafana/grafana:latest
    32→    container_name: adelie-grafana
    33→    restart: unless-stopped

    36→    environment:

    39→      GF_SERVER_ROOT_URL: https://monitoring.adelie-invest.com
    40→      GF_AUTH_ANONYMOUS_ENABLED: "false"
    41→    volumes:
    42→      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana
    43→      - ./grafana/provisioning:/etc/grafana/provisioning
    44→    depends_on:
    45→      - prometheus
    46→
    47→  # nginx: dashboard 앞단 프록시 (Streamlit _stcore 경로 재작성 + 포트 8501 노출)
    48→  nginx:
    49→    image: nginx:alpine
    50→    container_name: adelie-dashboard-nginx
    51→    restart: unless-stopped
    52→    ports:
    53→      - "8501:80"          # 외부 8501 → nginx 80 → dashboard:8501
    54→    volumes:
    55→      - ./nginx-dashboard.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro
    56→    depends_on:
    57→      - dashboard
    58→    networks:
    59→      - default
    60→
    61→  dashboard:
    62→    build:
    63→      context: ../docker-dashboard
    64→      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    65→    container_name: adelie-dashboard
    66→    restart: unless-stopped
    67→    expose:
    68→      - "8501"             # 내부 네트워크만 접근 (nginx가 프록시)
    69→    volumes:
    70→      - /home/ubuntu/.ssh/id_ed25519:/root/.ssh/id_ed25519:ro
    71→      - /home/ubuntu/.ssh/known_hosts:/root/.ssh/known_hosts:ro
    72→    environment:
    73→      DB_HOST: ${DB_HOST:-postgres}
    74→      DB_PORT: ${DB_PORT:-5432}
    75→      DB_NAME: ${DB_NAME:-narrative_invest}
    76→      DB_USER: ${DB_USER:-narative}
    77→      DB_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-password}
    78→      PROMETHEUS_URL: http://adelie-prometheus:9090
    79→      GRAFANA_URL: https://monitoring.adelie-invest.com
    80→      CLAUDE_API_KEY: ${CLAUDE_API_KEY:-}
    81→    networks:

    96→      - /sys:/sys:ro
    97→      - /var/lib/docker/:/var/lib/docker:ro
    98→      - /dev/disk/:/dev/disk:ro
    99→    privileged: true

content.content:
1→# Agent Architecture Reference
     2→
     3→에이전트 시스템의 현재 구조, 라우팅 패턴, 가드레일, 모델 전략.
     4→
     5→---
     6→
     7→## 1. 현재 4-에이전트 암묵 구조
     8→
     9→현재 시스템은 명시적 에이전트 분리 없이 4개의 암묵적 역할이
    10→단일 SSE 스트리밍 파이프라인 내에 혼합되어 있다.
    11→
    12→```
    13→  사용자 메시지
    14→       │
    15→       ▼
    16→┌──────────────────┐
    17→│  Router Agent    │  tutor.py: _route_with_llm()
    18→│  (gpt-4o-mini)   │  → decision: inline_action | inline_reply | open_canvas | open_chat
    19→└────────┬─────────┘
    20→         │
    21→         ▼
    22→┌──────────────────┐
    23→│  Guardrail Agent │  guardrail.py: run_guardrail()
    24→│  (LangGraph +    │  → SAFE | ADVICE | OFF_TOPIC | MALICIOUS
    25→│   gpt-4o-mini)   │  → keyword pre-filter + LLM structured output
    26→└────────┬─────────┘
    27→         │
    28→         ▼
    29→┌──────────────────┐
    30→│  Main Agent      │  tutor.py: generate_tutor_response()
    31→│  (gpt-5-mini /   │  → context 수집, LLM 스트리밍, DB 저장, 액션 추천
    32→│   gpt-4o-mini)   │
    33→└────────┬─────────┘
    34→         │
    35→         ▼
    36→┌──────────────────┐
    37→│  Viz Agent       │  tutor_chart_generator.py: generate_tutor_chart()
    38→│  (claude-haiku / │  → Plotly JSON 생성 + 7-gate 검증
    39→│   gpt-4o-mini)   │
    40→└──────────────────┘
    41→```
    42→
    43→### 현재 문제점
    44→
    45→1. **Router와 Main이 분리되지 않음** -- `/agent/chat`은 라우팅 없이 항상 Main 실행
    46→2. **Guardrail이 LLM 호출** -- 모든 요청에 gpt-4o-mini 1회 추가 호출 (~200ms)
    47→3. **컨텍스트 수집이 순차적** -- glossary, DB, stock, intel이 부분적으로만 병렬화
    48→4. **모델 고정** -- 단순 질문도 동일 모델 사용
    49→
    50→## 2. 목표: Specialist Routing
    51→
    52→Google ADK의 Coordinator/Dispatcher 패턴을 참고하여,
    53→intent별 전문 에이전트로 분기하는 구조.
    54→
    55→```
    56→  사용자 메시지
    57→       │
    58→       ▼
    59→┌──────────────────────────┐
    60→│  Intent Classifier       │  regex + keyword (LLM 미호출)
    61→│  → stock_analysis        │
    62→│  → education             │
    63→│  → market_overview       │
    64→│  → simple_chat           │
    65→└────────┬─────────────────┘
    66→         │
    67→    ┌────┼────────┬──────────────┐
    68→    ▼    ▼        ▼              ▼
    69→┌──────┐┌──────┐┌────────────┐┌───────────┐
    70→│Stock ││Edu   ││Market      ││Simple     │
    71→│Agent ││Agent ││Overview    ││Chat Agent │
    72→│      ││      ││Agent       ││           │
    73→│4o    ││4o-mini││4o-mini    ││4o-mini    │
    74→└──────┘└──────┘└────────────┘└───────────┘
    75→```
    76→
    77→### Intent Classification
    78→
    79→LLM 호출 없이 keyword + regex 기반으로 분류:
    80→
    81→```python
    82→def classify_intent(message: str) -> str:
    83→    msg = message.lower()
    84→
    85→    # stock_analysis: 종목명/코드 포함
    86→    if detect_stock_codes(message):
    87→        return "stock_analysis"
    88→
    89→    # education: 학습/용어 질문
    90→    education_keywords = ["뭐야", "뭔가요", "설명", "알려줘", "의미", "개념", "차이"]
    91→    if any(kw in msg for kw in education_keywords):
    92→        return "education"
    93→
    94→    # market_overview: 시장 전반
    95→    market_keywords = ["시장", "코스피", "코스닥", "지수", "전체", "섹터"]
    96→    if any(kw in msg for kw in market_keywords):
    97→        return "market_overview"
    98→
    99→    return "simple_chat"
   100→```
   101→
   102→## 3. 모델 티어링
   103→
   104→intent + 복잡도에 따라 모델을 동적 선택:
   105→
   106→| Intent | 기본 모델 | 복잡도 높을 때 |
   107→|--------|----------|---------------|
   108→| simple_chat | gpt-4o-mini | gpt-4o-mini |
   109→| education | gpt-4o-mini | gpt-4o-mini |
   110→| market_overview | gpt-4o-mini | gpt-4o |
   111→| stock_analysis | gpt-4o | gpt-4o |
   112→
   113→복잡도 판단 기준:
   114→- 메시지 길이 > 100자
   115→- 종목 2개 이상 비교 요청
   116→- "심층", "자세히", "비교 분석" 등 키워드
   117→
   118→```python
   119→def select_model(intent: str, message: str) -> str:
   120→    is_complex = (
   121→        len(message) > 100
   122→        or len(detect_stock_codes(message)) >= 2
   123→        or any(kw in message for kw in ["심층", "자세히", "비교 분석"])
   124→    )
   125→
   126→    if intent == "stock_analysis":
   127→        return "gpt-4o"
   128→    if intent in ("market_overview",) and is_complex:
   129→        return "gpt-4o"
   130→    return "gpt-4o-mini"
   131→```
   132→
   133→## 4. 컨텍스트 병렬화
   134→
   135→현재 `_collect_context()`에서 일부 컨텍스트 수집이 순차적이다.
   136→`canvas/analyzer.py`의 패턴처럼 `asyncio.gather`로 완전 병렬화:
   137→
   138→```python
   139→results = await asyncio.gather(
   140→    _collect_glossary_context(message, db),      # (str, list[dict])
   141→    _collect_db_context(message, db),             # (str, list[dict])
   142→    _collect_stock_context(message, stocks, db),  # (str, dict, list[dict])
   143→    collect_stock_intelligence(db, ctx, stocks),  # (str, list[dict], dict)
   144→    _collect_stock_lookup_context(message, db),   # (str, list[dict])
   145→    return_exceptions=True,                       # 부분 실패 허용
   146→)
   147→```
   148→
   149→Canvas analyzer에서 이미 이 패턴을 사용 중이며,
   150→Main Agent의 `_collect_context()`에도 동일하게 적용 가능하다.
   151→
   152→### 예상 지연 시간 개선
   153→
   154→| 패턴 | glossary | db | stock | intel | 합계 |
   155→|------|----------|-------|-------|-------|------|
   156→| 순차 | 50ms | 80ms | 200ms | 150ms | 480ms |
   157→| 병렬 | | | | | max(200ms) = 200ms |
   158→
   159→## 5. 프롬프트 캐싱 최적화
   160→
   161→시스템 프롬프트를 정적 prefix + 동적 suffix로 분리하여
   162→OpenAI 자동 프롬프트 캐싱을 활성화한다.
   163→
   164→```
   165→┌────────────────────────────────────┐
   166→│  정적 Prefix (캐싱 대상)            │  ~1500 토큰
   167→│  ├── 역할 정의                      │
   168→│  ├── 난이도별 프롬프트               │
   169→│  ├── 출력 형식 규칙                  │
   170→│  ├── 가드레일 지침                   │
   171→│  └── 차트 생성 규칙                  │
   172→├────────────────────────────────────┤
   173→│  동적 Suffix (매번 다름)             │
   174→│  ├── 용어 컨텍스트                   │
   175→│  ├── DB 사례/리포트                  │
   176→│  ├── 종목 데이터                     │
   177→│  ├── 대화 요약 (Tier 2)             │
   178→│  └── 엔티티 목록 (Tier 3)           │
   179→└────────────────────────────────────┘
   180→```
   181→
   182→정적 prefix가 1024 토큰 이상이면 50-90% 비용 할인 적용.
   183→
   184→## 6. 출력 가드레일
   185→
   186→### 현재: LangGraph + LLM 기반 입력 가드레일
   187→
   188→```python
   189→# guardrail.py — 입력 분류
   190→# 키워드 사전 필터 (즉시, <1ms)
   191→MALICIOUS_KEYWORDS = ["프롬프트", "시스템", "탈옥", "jailbreak", ...]
   192→def _pre_filter(message: str) -> Optional[str]:
   193→    for kw in MALICIOUS_KEYWORDS:
   194→        if kw in msg_lower:
   195→            return "MALICIOUS"
   196→    return None
   197→
   198→# LLM Structured Output (gpt-4o-mini, ~200ms)
   199→structured_llm = llm.with_structured_output(GuardrailClassification)
   200→result = await structured_llm.ainvoke([system, human])
   201→```
   202→
   203→### 목표: 출력 가드레일 (regex 기반, LLM 미호출, <1ms)
   204→
   205→LLM 응답에서 위험 패턴을 regex로 사후 검출:
   206→
   207→```python
   208→import re
   209→
   210→OUTPUT_GUARDRAILS = [
   211→    # API 키/시스템 정보 누출
   212→    (re.compile(r"(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|api[_-]?key\s*[:=])", re.I), "API_KEY_LEAK"),
   213→    # 직접 매수/매도 권유
   214→    (re.compile(r"(지금\s*(바로\s*)?사|빨리\s*매수|무조건\s*매도)", re.I), "DIRECT_ADVICE"),
   215→    # 수익률 보장
   216→    (re.compile(r"(\d+%\s*수익\s*보장|확실히\s*오릅니다|반드시\s*수익)", re.I), "GUARANTEE"),
   217→]
   218→
   219→def check_output(text: str) -> list[str]:
   220→    """출력 텍스트에서 위험 패턴 감지. 감지된 패턴 ID 리스트 반환."""
   221→    violations = []
   222→    for pattern, violation_id in OUTPUT_GUARDRAILS:
   223→        if pattern.search(text):
   224→            violations.append(violation_id)
   225→    return violations
   226→```
   227→
   228→입력 가드레일(LLM)과 출력 가드레일(regex)을 조합하면
   229→LLM 호출 횟수를 줄이면서도 안전성을 유지할 수 있다.
   230→
   231→## 7. 모드 오버라이드 테이블
   232→
   233→프론트엔드 UI 모드와 LLM 라우터의 의도가 충돌할 때의 해소 규칙.
   234→
   235→### UI 모드 정의
   236→
   237→| UI 모드 | 진입 경로 | 기대 동작 |
   238→|---------|----------|----------|
   239→| `home` | 홈 화면 AgentDock | 범용 대화 |
   240→| `stock` | 종목 상세 → AgentDock | 해당 종목 중심 분석 |
   241→| `education` | 교육 페이지 → AgentDock | 학습/용어 설명 |
   242→| `narrative` | 내러티브 페이지 → AgentDock | 사례 심층 분석 |
   243→
   244→### Router 결정 (decision)
   245→
   246→| decision | 동작 |
   247→|----------|------|
   248→| `inline_reply` | AgentDock 내 짧은 텍스트 응답 |
   249→| `inline_action` | 즉시 실행 (매수/매도/네비게이션) |
   250→| `open_canvas` | Canvas 전체 화면 분석 열기 |
   251→| `open_chat` | 멀티턴 대화 모드 전환 |
   252→
   253→### 충돌 해소 매트릭스
   254→
   255→| UI 모드 | LLM 의도 | 최종 결정 | 사유 |
   256→|---------|---------|----------|------|
   257→| home | inline_reply | inline_reply | 일치 |
   258→| home | open_canvas | open_canvas | LLM 판단 존중 |
   259→| stock | inline_reply | inline_reply | 짧은 답변 OK |
   260→| stock | open_canvas | open_canvas | 종목 심층 분석 |
   261→| stock | inline_action (buy) | inline_action | 종목 컨텍스트 있음 |
   262→| education | inline_action (buy) | **inline_reply** | 교육 모드에서 매매 액션 차단 |
   263→| education | open_canvas | open_canvas | 심화 학습 |
   264→| narrative | inline_action | **inline_reply** | 내러티브 모드에서 액션 차단 |
   265→| * | confidence < 0.4 | **inline_reply** | 저신뢰 → 안전한 기본값 |
   266→
   267→### 구현 위치
   268→
   269→`tutor.py`의 `_normalize_route_response()`에서 처리:
   270→
   271→```python
   272→# 신뢰도 임계값 미달 시 강제 inline_reply
   273→if confidence < confidence_threshold:
   274→    decision = "inline_reply"
   275→    action_id = None
   276→    inline_text = "요청을 짧게 처리할게요. 필요하면 캔버스로 이어서 볼 수 있어요."
   277→
   278→# inline_action인데 허용 목록에 없는 action_id → inline_reply 폴백
   279→if decision == "inline_action":
   280→    if not action_id or action_id not in allowed_action_ids:
   281→        decision = "inline_reply"
   282→        action_id = None
   283→```
   284→
   285→### Confidence Threshold
   286→
   287→`settings.TUTOR_ROUTE_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD` 환경변수로 설정.
   288→기본값 0.4. 이 값 미만이면 LLM 판단을 무시하고 `inline_reply`로 강제.
   289→
   290→## 8. 요청 흐름 전체 다이어그램
   291→
   292→```
   293→Client (AgentDock)
   294→    │
   295→    ├── POST /api/v1/agent/route   ← 라우팅 결정 (선택적)
   296→    │       │
   297→    │       ▼
   298→    │   Router (gpt-4o-mini, JSON mode)
   299→    │       │
   300→    │       ▼
   301→    │   decision → inline_reply | open_canvas | open_chat | inline_action
   302→    │
   303→    ├── POST /api/v1/agent/chat    ← 메인 대화 (SSE)
   304→    │       │
   305→    │       ▼
   306→    │   1. Guardrail (keyword pre-filter → LLM classify)
   307→    │       │
   308→    │       ▼
   309→    │   2. Context Collection (asyncio.gather)
   310→    │       ├── glossary DB
   311→    │       ├── historical cases DB
   312→    │       ├── stock prices (pykrx)
   313→    │       ├── stock intelligence
   314→    │       └── stock listings lookup
   315→    │       │
   316→    │       ▼
   317→    │   3. LLM Streaming (gpt-5-mini / Responses API)
   318→    │       │ SSE: text_delta, tool_call, guardrail_notice
   319→    │       │
   320→    │       ▼
   321→    │   4. Auto Visualization (if stock detected)
   322→    │       │ claude-haiku → gpt-4o-mini fallback
   323→    │       │ 7-gate validation
   324→    │       │ SSE: visualization
   325→    │       │
   326→    │       ▼
   327→    │   5. Action Recommendation + Sources
   328→    │       │ SSE: done (actions, sources, structured, model)
   329→    │       │
   330→    │       ▼
   331→    │   6. DB Save (session + messages + summary)
   332→    │
   333→    └── POST /api/v1/agent/quick-qa  ← 드래그 선택 즉석 설명
   334→            │
   335→            ▼
   336→        Quick QA (gpt-4o-mini, 150 토큰 제한)
   337→```
   338→

Explore the git history to understand the dev/frontend branch integration and the original plan for the canvas-agent-v4 feature.

1. Run `git log --oneline -30 develop` to see recent develop history
2. Run `git log --oneline -20 origin/dev/frontend` to see dev/frontend history  
3. Run `git log --oneline origin/feat/agent-canvas-v3-yj99son` to see the v3 branch history
4. Run `git log --all --oneline --graph -40` to visualize the branch topology
5. Check for any PR descriptions: `gh pr list --state all --limit 20` to find canvas/agent related PRs
6. Look for any plan files or docs:
   - `ls frontend/docs/` — read agent-architecture.md
   - Check `/home/hj/.claude/projects/-home-hj-2026-project-adelie-investment/` for any plan files or transcripts
   - `ls /home/hj/.claude/projects/-home-hj-2026-project-adelie-investment/*.jsonl` — check for plan transcripts
7. Run `git diff --stat origin/dev/frontend..develop` to see what changed between dev/frontend and develop
8. Run `git log --oneline --merges develop -10` to find merge commits

Key question: What was the state BEFORE dev/frontend was integrated? What was the original canvas-agent-v4 plan?

Very thorough exploration of the demo vs test (staging) environment distinction in the adelie-investment project.

1. Read `lxd/inventory.md` fully — find all references to deploy-test (10.10.10.20) vs test-server (10.10.10.19)
2. Read `docker-compose.prod.yml` — this is used by deploy-test
3. Check if there's a `docker-compose.staging.yml` or similar for test-server
4. Read `.github/workflows/deploy.yml` — what triggers deployment and to WHERE?
5. Check if there are other deploy workflows — `ls .github/workflows/`
6. Read `lxd/Makefile` — find `deploy-test` vs `deploy-staging` targets, understand the differences
7. Check `CLAUDE.md` for any mentions of demo.adelie-invest.com vs test.adelie-invest.com
8. Check nginx configs if any exist — `find` for nginx.conf files
9. Look at `infra/` directory structure for any Cloudflare tunnel or domain configs

Key question to answer: What is the exact deployment topology?
- demo.adelie-invest.com → deploy-test (10.10.10.20) — which branch? which images?
- test.adelie-invest.com → test-server (10.10.10.19) — which branch? which images?
- How do they differ in terms of DB, branch, Docker image tags?

content.content:
1→name: AWS Deploy (ECR → ECS)
     2→
     3→# LXD/Docker Hub 방식에서 AWS ECS로 전환 시 활성화
     4→# Phase 2 완료 후 이 워크플로우 사용
     5→# 현재는 deploy.yml (Docker Hub + SSH) 방식 운영 중
     6→
     7→on:
     8→  workflow_dispatch:     # 수동 트리거만 허용 (전환 전)
     9→    inputs:
    10→      environment:
    11→        description: '배포 환경'
    12→        required: true
    13→        default: 'staging'
    14→        type: choice
    15→        options: [staging, prod]
    16→      image_tag:
    17→        description: 'ECR 이미지 태그 (기본: latest)'
    18→        required: false
    19→        default: 'latest'
    20→
    21→  # Phase 5 (DNS 전환 완료) 이후 주석 해제:
    22→  # push:
    23→  #   branches:
    24→  #     - main       # prod
    25→  #     - develop    # staging
    26→
    27→env:
    28→  AWS_REGION:     ap-northeast-2
    29→  ECR_REPOSITORY: adelie/backend-api
    30→
    31→concurrency:
    32→  group: aws-deploy-${{ github.event.inputs.environment || github.ref_name }}
    33→  cancel-in-progress: false
    34→
    35→jobs:
    36→  build-and-push:
    37→    name: Docker 빌드 → ECR 푸시
    38→    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    39→    outputs:
    40→      image_tag:  ${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }}
    41→      full_image: ${{ steps.tag.outputs.full_image }}
    42→
    43→    steps:
    44→      - name: 코드 체크아웃
    45→        uses: actions/checkout@v4
    46→
    47→      - name: AWS 자격증명 설정
    48→        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
    49→        with:
    50→          aws-access-key-id:     ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
    51→          aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
    52→          aws-region:            ${{ env.AWS_REGION }}
    53→
    54→      - name: ECR 로그인
    55→        uses: aws-actions/amazon-ecr-login@v2
    56→
    57→      - name: 이미지 태그 결정
    58→        id: tag
    59→        env:
    60→          ACCOUNT_ID: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCOUNT_ID }}
    61→        run: |
    62→          INPUT_TAG="${{ github.event.inputs.image_tag }}"
    63→          SHORT_SHA=$(echo ${{ github.sha }} | head -c 8)
    64→          TAG="${INPUT_TAG:-${SHORT_SHA}}"
    65→          REGISTRY="${ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_REGION}.amazonaws.com"
    66→          echo "tag=${TAG}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
    67→          echo "full_image=${REGISTRY}/${ECR_REPOSITORY}:${TAG}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
    68→          echo "latest_image=${REGISTRY}/${ECR_REPOSITORY}:latest" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
    69→
    70→      - name: Docker 이미지 빌드
    71→        run: |
    72→          docker build \
    73→            -f fastapi/Dockerfile \
    74→            -t ${{ steps.tag.outputs.full_image }} \
    75→            -t ${{ steps.tag.outputs.latest_image }} \
    76→            .
    77→
    78→      - name: ECR 이미지 푸시
    79→        run: |
    80→          docker push ${{ steps.tag.outputs.full_image }}
    81→          docker push ${{ steps.tag.outputs.latest_image }}
    82→
    83→  deploy-ecs:
    84→    name: ECS 롤링 배포
    85→    needs: build-and-push
    86→    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    87→    environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
    88→
    89→    steps:
    90→      - name: AWS 자격증명 설정
    91→        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
    92→        with:
    93→          aws-access-key-id:     ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
    94→          aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
    95→          aws-region:            ${{ env.AWS_REGION }}
    96→
    97→      - name: ECS 클러스터/서비스 이름 결정
    98→        id: ecs
    99→        run: |
   100→          ENV="${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'staging' }}"
   101→          echo "cluster=adelie-${ENV}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
   102→          echo "service=adelie-${ENV}-backend-api" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
   103→          echo "environment=${ENV}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
   104→
   105→      - name: ECS 서비스 강제 재배포
   106→        run: |
   107→          aws ecs update-service \
   108→            --cluster ${{ steps.ecs.outputs.cluster }} \
   109→            --service  ${{ steps.ecs.outputs.service }} \
   110→            --force-new-deployment \
   111→            --region ${{ env.AWS_REGION }}
   112→
   113→      - name: 배포 안정화 대기 (최대 10분)
   114→        run: |
   115→          aws ecs wait services-stable \
   116→            --cluster  ${{ steps.ecs.outputs.cluster }} \
   117→            --services ${{ steps.ecs.outputs.service }} \
   118→            --region ${{ env.AWS_REGION }}
   119→
   120→      - name: Discord 배포 알림
   121→        if: always()
   122→        env:
   123→          DISCORD_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.DISCORD_WEBHOOK }}
   124→        run: |
   125→          STATUS="${{ job.status }}"
   126→          ENV="${{ steps.ecs.outputs.environment }}"
   127→          TAG="${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.image_tag }}"
   128→
   129→          if [ "$STATUS" = "success" ]; then
   130→            COLOR=3066993
   131→            ICON=":white_check_mark:"
   132→          else
   133→            COLOR=15158332
   134→            ICON=":x:"
   135→          fi
   136→
   137→          curl -sf -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
   138→            -d "{
   139→              \"embeds\": [{
   140→                \"title\": \"${ICON} AWS ECS Deploy ${STATUS}\",
   141→                \"color\": ${COLOR},
   142→                \"fields\": [

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile a comprehensive report on the demo vs test (staging) environment distinction.

## Comprehensive Exploration: Demo vs Test (Staging) Environment Topology

Based on my thorough analysis of the codebase, here's the complete breakdown of the demo and staging deployment environments:

---

### **DEPLOYMENT TOPOLOGY OVERVIEW**

| Aspect | Demo (Production) | Test (Staging) |
|--------|------------------|---|
| **Server** | deploy-test (10.10.10.20) | test-server (10.10.10.19) |
| **Public Domain** | https://demo.adelie-invest.com | https://test.adelie-invest.com |
| **Git Branch** | `develop` | `release/feb20-stable` |
| **Image Registry** | dorae222 (Docker Hub) | dorae222 (Docker Hub) |
| **Image Tag** | `latest` | `feb20-stable` |
| **Frontend Port** | :80 (nginx) | :80 (nginx) |
| **Backend API Port** | :8082 (internal) | :8082 (internal) |
| **Database** | adelie-postgres (internal) | adelie-postgres (internal) |
| **Redis** | adelie-redis (internal) | adelie-redis (internal) |
| **MinIO** | adelie-minio | N/A (not deployed in test) |
| **Docker Compose** | docker-compose.prod.yml | docker-compose.prod.yml |

---

### **DEPLOYMENT CONFIGURATION FILES**

#### **1. Main Application (docker-compose.prod.yml)**
- **Location**: `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/docker-compose.prod.yml`
- **Used by both demo and staging** — configuration is identical
- **Services deployed**:
  - `postgres` (pgvector:pg16, 16GB RAM, 4 CPU)
  - `redis` (redis:7-alpine, 2GB RAM, 2 CPU)
  - `minio` (object storage)
  - `frontend` (dorae222/adelie-frontend:TAG)
  - `backend-api` (dorae222/adelie-backend-api:TAG, 8GB RAM, 4 CPU)
  - `ai-pipeline` (dorae222/adelie-ai-pipeline:TAG, optional with `--profile pipeline`)

**Key difference**: Image TAG is injected at deploy time:
- Demo: `TAG=latest` (from `develop` branch)
- Staging: `TAG=feb20-stable` (from `release/feb20-stable` branch)

#### **2. Monitoring Stack (infra/monitoring/docker-compose.yml)**
- **Only deployed on demo (deploy-test)**
- **Not present on staging (test-server)**
- **Services**:
  - `prometheus` (metrics collection, 30-day retention)
  - `alertmanager` (alert routing)
  - `grafana` (dashboards, https://monitoring.adelie-invest.com)
  - `cadvisor` (container metrics)
  - `nginx` (Streamlit dashboard proxy, https://dashboard.adelie-invest.com:8501)
  - `dashboard` (Streamlit app)

#### **3. Frontend Nginx Config (frontend/nginx.conf)**
- **Identical for both environments**
- **Routes**:
  - `/` → SPA (React Router)
  - `/api/v1/*` → proxy to `backend-api:8082`
  - `/api/auth/*` → rewritten to `/api/v1/auth/*` (legacy compatibility)
  - `/api/health` → backend health check
  - Static assets cached 7 days

---

### **CI/CD PIPELINE & DEPLOYMENT TRIGGERS**

#### **1. Main Deploy Workflow (.github/workflows/deploy.yml)**
```
Trigger: push to develop branch
├─ Build images (frontend, backend-api, ai-pipeline)
├─ Push to Docker Hub (dorae222/adelie-*:latest)
└─ Deploy to deploy-test (10.10.10.20)
    └─ Script: cd ~/adelie-investment && git pull origin develop && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull && up -d
```

**Key points**:
- Runs on **self-hosted runner** (deploy-test LXD host itself)
- Always deploys to **demo only** (deploy-test)
- Image tag always `latest`
- Branch: `develop`
- Discord notifications on success/failure (with author role context)

#### **2. AWS Deploy Workflow (.github/workflows/deploy-aws.yml)**
```
Status: Disabled (Phase 2 transition, currently manual trigger only)
├─ Build → ECR push
├─ ECS service update
└─ Target: staging or prod (selectable via input)
```

**Note**: This is for future AWS migration (Phase 5). Currently NOT active.

#### **3. Infra Management (lxd/Makefile)**
```makefile
deploy-test:
  ├─ Build: make build (frontend, backend-api, ai-pipeline)
  ├─ Push: docker push to Docker Hub
  └─ Deploy: ssh deploy-test 'git pull origin develop && docker compose up -d'

deploy-staging:
  ├─ No build step
  ├─ Direct lxc exec test-server
  └─ Script: git pull origin release/feb20-stable && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull && up -d
```

**Key difference**:
- `deploy-test` = full build + push cycle (for demo)
- `deploy-staging` = git pull + docker pull only (for test-server)
- Staging can be deployed manually without GitHub Actions

---

### **BRANCH STRATEGY**

| Branch | Purpose | Deployment | Image Tag |
|--------|---------|-----------|-----------|
| `develop` | Active development | Demo (auto via CI) | `latest` |
| `main` | (Future) Production | N/A (not yet in use) | N/A |
| `release/feb20-stable` | Staging/Testing | Test (manual via lxd/Makefile) | `feb20-stable` |
| `feature/*`, `dev/*` | Feature branches | None (local dev only) | N/A |

---

### **DATABASE & STATE ISOLATION**

**Demo (deploy-test)**:
- PostgreSQL: `adelie-postgres` (internal to docker-compose.prod.yml)
- Redis: `adelie-redis`
- MinIO: `adelie-minio`
- **Independent database** — not synced with staging
- **Pipeline scheduler**: ENABLED (runs nightly, crawls news + generates cases)

**Staging (test-server)**:
- PostgreSQL: `adelie-postgres` (internal to docker-compose.prod.yml)
- Redis: `adelie-redis`
- MinIO: NOT deployed
- **Independent database** — not synced with demo
- **Pipeline scheduler**: DISABLED (staging is for testing only)

---

### **SERVICE URL MAPPING**

| URL | Service | Server | Deployment |
|-----|---------|--------|-----------|
| https://demo.adelie-invest.com | Frontend | deploy-test:80 (nginx) | Demo |
| https://monitoring.adelie-invest.com | Grafana | deploy-test:3000 | Demo only |
| https://dashboard.adelie-invest.com | Streamlit Dashboard | deploy-test:8501 (nginx proxy) | Demo only |
| https://test.adelie-invest.com | Frontend | test-server:80 (nginx) | Staging |
| (none) | Backend API | :8082 (internal) | Both |

**Routing**: Cloudflare Tunnel (setup script at `infra/setup-cloudflare-tunnel.sh`)

---

### **DEPLOYMENT COMPARISON TABLE**

| Component | Demo (Latest) | Staging (Feb20) |
|-----------|---|---|
| **Server** | deploy-test (LXD, 16/32GB) | test-server (LXD, 8/16GB) |
| **Branch** | `develop` | `release/feb20-stable` |
| **Git Commit** | HEAD: `4298fa4` (latest) | HEAD: `091a1bb` (Feb 20 snapshot) |
| **Image Tag** | `dorae222/adelie-*:latest` | `dorae222/adelie-*:feb20-stable` |
| **Frontend** | ✅ React 19 + Vite | ✅ React 19 + Vite |
| **Backend** | ✅ FastAPI + LangGraph | ✅ FastAPI + LangGraph |
| **Database** | ✅ PostgreSQL pgvector:pg16 | ✅ PostgreSQL pgvector:pg16 |
| **Redis** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| **MinIO** | ✅ Yes | ❌ No |
| **Monitoring** | ✅ Prometheus + Grafana | ❌ None |
| **Dashboard** | ✅ Streamlit | ❌ None |
| **Pipeline** | ✅ Enabled (nightly) | ❌ Disabled |
| **CI/CD Trigger** | GitHub Actions `develop` | Manual (`make -f lxd/Makefile deploy-staging`) |

---

### **DEPLOYMENT FLOW SUMMARY**

**Demo (Auto via GitHub Actions)**:
1. Developer pushes to `develop` branch
2. GitHub Actions (deploy.yml) triggers on self-hosted runner
3. Docker images built: `dorae222/adelie-frontend:latest`, `dorae222/adelie-backend-api:latest`, `dorae222/adelie-ai-pipeline:latest`
4. Images pushed to Docker Hub
5. SSH to deploy-test: `git pull origin develop && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d`
6. Health checks run
7. Discord notification sent

**Staging (Manual via CLI)**:
1. Maintainer (dorae222) runs: `make -f lxd/Makefile deploy-staging`
2. LXC exec into test-server (10.10.10.19)
3. `git pull origin release/feb20-stable`
4. `docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull` (pulls pre-built images with tag `feb20-stable`)
5. `docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d`
6. Health checks can be verified manually: `make -f lxd/Makefile health-staging`

---

### **KEY INSIGHTS**

1. **Same docker-compose.prod.yml** — Configuration is environment-agnostic; only TAG and branch differ
2. **Separate git branches** — `develop` for demo, `release/feb20-stable` for staging
3. **Demo is always latest** — Auto-deployed on every `develop` push
4. **Staging is stable snapshot** — Manually deployed, stable for testing
5. **Monitoring only in demo** — Grafana, Prometheus, Streamlit dashboard only on deploy-test
6. **Pipeline scheduler difference** — Demo runs nightly; staging disabled
7. **No shared database** — Each environment has independent PostgreSQL, Redis
8. **Future AWS transition** — deploy-aws.yml workflow prepared for Phase 5 (currently disabled)

---

- `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/lxd/inventory.md` — Server inventory

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile a comprehensive report on the demo vs test (staging) environment distinction.

## Comprehensive Exploration: Demo vs Test (Staging) Environment Topology

Based on my thorough analysis of the codebase, here's the complete breakdown of the demo and staging deployment environments:

---

### **DEPLOYMENT TOPOLOGY OVERVIEW**

| Aspect | Demo (Production) | Test (Staging) |
|--------|------------------|---|
| **Server** | deploy-test (10.10.10.20) | test-server (10.10.10.19) |
| **Public Domain** | https://demo.adelie-invest.com | https://test.adelie-invest.com |
| **Git Branch** | `develop` | `release/feb20-stable` |
| **Image Registry** | dorae222 (Docker Hub) | dorae222 (Docker Hub) |
| **Image Tag** | `latest` | `feb20-stable` |
| **Frontend Port** | :80 (nginx) | :80 (nginx) |
| **Backend API Port** | :8082 (internal) | :8082 (internal) |
| **Database** | adelie-postgres (internal) | adelie-postgres (internal) |
| **Redis** | adelie-redis (internal) | adelie-redis (internal) |
| **MinIO** | adelie-minio | N/A (not deployed in test) |
| **Docker Compose** | docker-compose.prod.yml | docker-compose.prod.yml |

---

### **DEPLOYMENT CONFIGURATION FILES**

#### **1. Main Application (docker-compose.prod.yml)**
- **Location**: `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/docker-compose.prod.yml`
- **Used by both demo and staging** — configuration is identical
- **Services deployed**:
  - `postgres` (pgvector:pg16, 16GB RAM, 4 CPU)
  - `redis` (redis:7-alpine, 2GB RAM, 2 CPU)
  - `minio` (object storage)
  - `frontend` (dorae222/adelie-frontend:TAG)
  - `backend-api` (dorae222/adelie-backend-api:TAG, 8GB RAM, 4 CPU)
  - `ai-pipeline` (dorae222/adelie-ai-pipeline:TAG, optional with `--profile pipeline`)

**Key difference**: Image TAG is injected at deploy time:
- Demo: `TAG=latest` (from `develop` branch)
- Staging: `TAG=feb20-stable` (from `release/feb20-stable` branch)

#### **2. Monitoring Stack (infra/monitoring/docker-compose.yml)**
- **Only deployed on demo (deploy-test)**
- **Not present on staging (test-server)**
- **Services**:
  - `prometheus` (metrics collection, 30-day retention)
  - `alertmanager` (alert routing)
  - `grafana` (dashboards, https://monitoring.adelie-invest.com)
  - `cadvisor` (container metrics)
  - `nginx` (Streamlit dashboard proxy, https://dashboard.adelie-invest.com:8501)
  - `dashboard` (Streamlit app)

#### **3. Frontend Nginx Config (frontend/nginx.conf)**
- **Identical for both environments**
- **Routes**:
  - `/` → SPA (React Router)
  - `/api/v1/*` → proxy to `backend-api:8082`
  - `/api/auth/*` → rewritten to `/api/v1/auth/*` (legacy compatibility)
  - `/api/health` → backend health check
  - Static assets cached 7 days

---

### **CI/CD PIPELINE & DEPLOYMENT TRIGGERS**

#### **1. Main Deploy Workflow (.github/workflows/deploy.yml)**
```
Trigger: push to develop branch
├─ Build images (frontend, backend-api, ai-pipeline)
├─ Push to Docker Hub (dorae222/adelie-*:latest)
└─ Deploy to deploy-test (10.10.10.20)
    └─ Script: cd ~/adelie-investment && git pull origin develop && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull && up -d
```

**Key points**:
- Runs on **self-hosted runner** (deploy-test LXD host itself)
- Always deploys to **demo only** (deploy-test)
- Image tag always `latest`
- Branch: `develop`
- Discord notifications on success/failure (with author role context)

#### **2. AWS Deploy Workflow (.github/workflows/deploy-aws.yml)**
```
Status: Disabled (Phase 2 transition, currently manual trigger only)
├─ Build → ECR push
├─ ECS service update
└─ Target: staging or prod (selectable via input)
```

**Note**: This is for future AWS migration (Phase 5). Currently NOT active.

#### **3. Infra Management (lxd/Makefile)**
```makefile
deploy-test:
  ├─ Build: make build (frontend, backend-api, ai-pipeline)
  ├─ Push: docker push to Docker Hub
  └─ Deploy: ssh deploy-test 'git pull origin develop && docker compose up -d'

deploy-staging:
  ├─ No build step
  ├─ Direct lxc exec test-server
  └─ Script: git pull origin release/feb20-stable && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull && up -d
```

**Key difference**:
- `deploy-test` = full build + push cycle (for demo)
- `deploy-staging` = git pull + docker pull only (for test-server)
- Staging can be deployed manually without GitHub Actions

---

### **BRANCH STRATEGY**

| Branch | Purpose | Deployment | Image Tag |
|--------|---------|-----------|-----------|
| `develop` | Active development | Demo (auto via CI) | `latest` |
| `main` | (Future) Production | N/A (not yet in use) | N/A |
| `release/feb20-stable` | Staging/Testing | Test (manual via lxd/Makefile) | `feb20-stable` |
| `feature/*`, `dev/*` | Feature branches | None (local dev only) | N/A |

---

### **DATABASE & STATE ISOLATION**

**Demo (deploy-test)**:
- PostgreSQL: `adelie-postgres` (internal to docker-compose.prod.yml)
- Redis: `adelie-redis`
- MinIO: `adelie-minio`
- **Independent database** — not synced with staging
- **Pipeline scheduler**: ENABLED (runs nightly, crawls news + generates cases)

**Staging (test-server)**:
- PostgreSQL: `adelie-postgres` (internal to docker-compose.prod.yml)
- Redis: `adelie-redis`
- MinIO: NOT deployed
- **Independent database** — not synced with demo
- **Pipeline scheduler**: DISABLED (staging is for testing only)

---

### **SERVICE URL MAPPING**

| URL | Service | Server | Deployment |
|-----|---------|--------|-----------|
| https://demo.adelie-invest.com | Frontend | deploy-test:80 (nginx) | Demo |
| https://monitoring.adelie-invest.com | Grafana | deploy-test:3000 | Demo only |
| https://dashboard.adelie-invest.com | Streamlit Dashboard | deploy-test:8501 (nginx proxy) | Demo only |
| https://test.adelie-invest.com | Frontend | test-server:80 (nginx) | Staging |
| (none) | Backend API | :8082 (internal) | Both |

**Routing**: Cloudflare Tunnel (setup script at `infra/setup-cloudflare-tunnel.sh`)

---

### **DEPLOYMENT COMPARISON TABLE**

| Component | Demo (Latest) | Staging (Feb20) |
|-----------|---|---|
| **Server** | deploy-test (LXD, 16/32GB) | test-server (LXD, 8/16GB) |
| **Branch** | `develop` | `release/feb20-stable` |
| **Git Commit** | HEAD: `4298fa4` (latest) | HEAD: `091a1bb` (Feb 20 snapshot) |
| **Image Tag** | `dorae222/adelie-*:latest` | `dorae222/adelie-*:feb20-stable` |
| **Frontend** | ✅ React 19 + Vite | ✅ React 19 + Vite |
| **Backend** | ✅ FastAPI + LangGraph | ✅ FastAPI + LangGraph |
| **Database** | ✅ PostgreSQL pgvector:pg16 | ✅ PostgreSQL pgvector:pg16 |
| **Redis** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| **MinIO** | ✅ Yes | ❌ No |
| **Monitoring** | ✅ Prometheus + Grafana | ❌ None |
| **Dashboard** | ✅ Streamlit | ❌ None |
| **Pipeline** | ✅ Enabled (nightly) | ❌ Disabled |
| **CI/CD Trigger** | GitHub Actions `develop` | Manual (`make -f lxd/Makefile deploy-staging`) |

---

### **DEPLOYMENT FLOW SUMMARY**

**Demo (Auto via GitHub Actions)**:
1. Developer pushes to `develop` branch
2. GitHub Actions (deploy.yml) triggers on self-hosted runner
3. Docker images built: `dorae222/adelie-frontend:latest`, `dorae222/adelie-backend-api:latest`, `dorae222/adelie-ai-pipeline:latest`
4. Images pushed to Docker Hub
5. SSH to deploy-test: `git pull origin develop && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d`
6. Health checks run
7. Discord notification sent

**Staging (Manual via CLI)**:
1. Maintainer (dorae222) runs: `make -f lxd/Makefile deploy-staging`
2. LXC exec into test-server (10.10.10.19)
3. `git pull origin release/feb20-stable`
4. `docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull` (pulls pre-built images with tag `feb20-stable`)
5. `docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d`
6. Health checks can be verified manually: `make -f lxd/Makefile health-staging`

---

### **KEY INSIGHTS**

1. **Same docker-compose.prod.yml** — Configuration is environment-agnostic; only TAG and branch differ
2. **Separate git branches** — `develop` for demo, `release/feb20-stable` for staging
3. **Demo is always latest** — Auto-deployed on every `develop` push
4. **Staging is stable snapshot** — Manually deployed, stable for testing
5. **Monitoring only in demo** — Grafana, Prometheus, Streamlit dashboard only on deploy-test
6. **Pipeline scheduler difference** — Demo runs nightly; staging disabled
7. **No shared database** — Each environment has independent PostgreSQL, Redis
8. **Future AWS transition** — deploy-aws.yml workflow prepared for Phase 5 (currently disabled)

---

### **FILE LOCATIONS REFERENCED**

- `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/lxd/inventory.md` — Server inventory
- `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/docker-compose.prod.yml` — Main app stack (both demo & staging)
- `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/infra/monitoring/docker-compose.yml` — Monitoring stack (demo only)
- `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/lxd/Makefile` — `deploy-test` and `deploy-staging` targets
- `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/.github/workflows/deploy.yml` — Auto CI/CD (demo)
- `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/.github/workflows/deploy-aws.yml` — Future AWS deployment (disabled)
- `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/frontend/nginx.conf` — Identical nginx config for both
- `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/CLAUDE.md` — Service URLs documented

Based on **frontend/docs/agent-architecture.md** (in develop, synced to v4), the v4 plan includes:

#### Design Goals:
1. **Intent Classifier** (regex + keyword, no LLM call)
   - `stock_analysis` → specialized handler
   - `education` → learning mode
   - `market_overview` → market analysis
   - `simple_chat` → fallback

2. **Specialist Routing**
   - Replace monolithic "Main Agent" with intent-specific agents
   - Stock Agent (gpt-4o) → Market Overview Agent (gpt-4o-mini) → Education Agent (gpt-4o-mini) → Simple Chat (gpt-4o-mini)

3. **Model Tiering**
   - Simple queries → `gpt-4o-mini`
   - Complex multi-stock analysis → `gpt-4o`
   - Fallback for unconfident routing

4. **Context Parallelization**
   - Replace sequential glossary/DB/stock fetching with `asyncio.gather()`
   - Expected improvement: 480ms → 200ms latency

5. **Prompt Caching Optimization**
   - Split system prompt into static prefix (1500 tokens, cacheable) + dynamic suffix
   - 50-90% cost savings for cached requests

6. **Output Guardrails (regex-based)**
   - Detect API key leaks, direct trading advice, guaranteed returns
   - <1ms checks, no LLM calls

7. **Mode Override Table**
   - UI mode (home/stock/education/narrative) + LLM intent conflict resolution
   - Example: education mode blocks trading actions

**Deleted (migration to new system):**
- `changes/` directory (9 design documents) — archived

**Active branches merged recently:**

- `dev/chatbot` (PR #28, #25, #23) — guardrail + recommendation questions
- `dev/backend-tutor-user-sessions` (PR #24) — session-user linking
- `hotfix/pipeline` (PR #18, #13) — KST date handling, LLM routing
- `feat/keywords-icon-mapping-stabilization` (PR #19)

---

### What Was the Original Canvas-Agent-v4 Plan?

Based on **frontend/docs/agent-architecture.md** (in develop, synced to v4), the v4 plan includes:

#### Design Goals:
1. **Intent Classifier** (regex + keyword, no LLM call)
   - `stock_analysis` → specialized handler
   - `education` → learning mode
   - `market_overview` → market analysis
   - `simple_chat` → fallback

2. **Specialist Routing**
   - Replace monolithic "Main Agent" with intent-specific agents
   - Stock Agent (gpt-4o) → Market Overview Agent (gpt-4o-mini) → Education Agent (gpt-4o-mini) → Simple Chat (gpt-4o-mini)

3. **Model Tiering**
   - Simple queries → `gpt-4o-mini`
   - Complex multi-stock analysis → `gpt-4o`
   - Fallback for unconfident routing

4. **Context Parallelization**
   - Replace sequential glossary/DB/stock fetching with `asyncio.gather()`
   - Expected improvement: 480ms → 200ms latency

5. **Prompt Caching Optimization**
   - Split system prompt into static prefix (1500 tokens, cacheable) + dynamic suffix
   - 50-90% cost savings for cached requests

6. **Output Guardrails (regex-based)**
   - Detect API key leaks, direct trading advice, guaranteed returns
   - <1ms checks, no LLM calls

7. **Mode Override Table**
   - UI mode (home/stock/education/narrative) + LLM intent conflict resolution
   - Example: education mode blocks trading actions

---

**PR #27 description:** "feat: 튜터 UX 개선 및 토큰 자동 갱신 추가"

1→# Agent Architecture Reference
     2→
     3→에이전트 시스템의 현재 구조, 라우팅 패턴, 가드레일, 모델 전략.
     4→
     5→---
     6→
     7→## 1. 현재 4-에이전트 암묵 구조
     8→
     9→현재 시스템은 명시적 에이전트 분리 없이 4개의 암묵적 역할이
    10→단일 SSE 스트리밍 파이프라인 내에 혼합되어 있다.
    11→
    12→```
    13→  사용자 메시지
    14→       │
    15→       ▼
    16→┌──────────────────┐
    17→│  Router Agent    │  tutor.py: _route_with_llm()
    18→│  (gpt-4o-mini)   │  → decision: inline_action | inline_reply | open_canvas | open_chat
    19→└────────┬─────────┘
    20→         │
    21→         ▼
    22→┌──────────────────┐
    23→│  Guardrail Agent │  guardrail.py: run_guardrail()
    24→│  (LangGraph +    │  → SAFE | ADVICE | OFF_TOPIC | MALICIOUS
    25→│   gpt-4o-mini)   │  → keyword pre-filter + LLM structured output
    26→└────────┬─────────┘
    27→         │
    28→         ▼
    29→┌──────────────────┐
    30→│  Main Agent      │  tutor.py: generate_tutor_response()
    31→│  (gpt-5-mini /   │  → context 수집, LLM 스트리밍, DB 저장, 액션 추천
    32→│   gpt-4o-mini)   │
    33→└────────┬─────────┘
    34→         │
    35→         ▼
    36→┌──────────────────┐
    37→│  Viz Agent       │  tutor_chart_generator.py: generate_tutor_chart()
    38→│  (claude-haiku / │  → Plotly JSON 생성 + 7-gate 검증
    39→│   gpt-4o-mini)   │
    40→└──────────────────┘
    41→```
    42→
    43→### 현재 문제점
    44→
    45→1. **Router와 Main이 분리되지 않음** -- `/agent/chat`은 라우팅 없이 항상 Main 실행
    46→2. **Guardrail이 LLM 호출** -- 모든 요청에 gpt-4o-mini 1회 추가 호출 (~200ms)
    47→3. **컨텍스트 수집이 순차적** -- glossary, DB, stock, intel이 부분적으로만 병렬화
    48→4. **모델 고정** -- 단순 질문도 동일 모델 사용
    49→
    50→## 2. 목표: Specialist Routing
    51→
    52→Google ADK의 Coordinator/Dispatcher 패턴을 참고하여,
    53→intent별 전문 에이전트로 분기하는 구조.
    54→
    55→```
    56→  사용자 메시지
    57→       │
    58→       ▼
    59→┌──────────────────────────┐
    60→│  Intent Classifier       │  regex + keyword (LLM 미호출)
    61→│  → stock_analysis        │
    62→│  → education             │
    63→│  → market_overview       │
    64→│  → simple_chat           │
    65→└────────┬─────────────────┘
    66→         │
    67→    ┌────┼────────┬──────────────┐
    68→    ▼    ▼        ▼              ▼
    69→┌──────┐┌──────┐┌────────────┐┌───────────┐
    70→│Stock ││Edu   ││Market      ││Simple     │
    71→│Agent ││Agent ││Overview    ││Chat Agent │
    72→│      ││      ││Agent       ││           │
    73→│4o    ││4o-mini││4o-mini    ││4o-mini    │
    74→└──────┘└──────┘└────────────┘└───────────┘
    75→```
    76→
    77→### Intent Classification
    78→
    79→LLM 호출 없이 keyword + regex 기반으로 분류:
    80→
    81→```python
    82→def classify_intent(message: str) -> str:
    83→    msg = message.lower()
    84→
    85→    # stock_analysis: 종목명/코드 포함
    86→    if detect_stock_codes(message):
    87→        return "stock_analysis"
    88→
    89→    # education: 학습/용어 질문
    90→    education_keywords = ["뭐야", "뭔가요", "설명", "알려줘", "의미", "개념", "차이"]
    91→    if any(kw in msg for kw in education_keywords):
    92→        return "education"
    93→
    94→    # market_overview: 시장 전반
    95→    market_keywords = ["시장", "코스피", "코스닥", "지수", "전체", "섹터"]
    96→    if any(kw in msg for kw in market_keywords):
    97→        return "market_overview"
    98→
    99→    return "simple_chat"
   100→```
   101→
   102→## 3. 모델 티어링
   103→
   104→intent + 복잡도에 따라 모델을 동적 선택:
   105→
   106→| Intent | 기본 모델 | 복잡도 높을 때 |
   107→|--------|----------|---------------|
   108→| simple_chat | gpt-4o-mini | gpt-4o-mini |
   109→| education | gpt-4o-mini | gpt-4o-mini |
   110→| market_overview | gpt-4o-mini | gpt-4o |
   111→| stock_analysis | gpt-4o | gpt-4o |
   112→
   113→복잡도 판단 기준:
   114→- 메시지 길이 > 100자
   115→- 종목 2개 이상 비교 요청
   116→- "심층", "자세히", "비교 분석" 등 키워드
   117→
   118→```python
   119→def select_model(intent: str, message: str) -> str:
   120→    is_complex = (
   121→        len(message) > 100
   122→        or len(detect_stock_codes(message)) >= 2
   123→        or any(kw in message for kw in ["심층", "자세히", "비교 분석"])
   124→    )
   125→
   126→    if intent == "stock_analysis":
   127→        return "gpt-4o"
   128→    if intent in ("market_overview",) and is_complex:
   129→        return "gpt-4o"
   130→    return "gpt-4o-mini"
   131→```
   132→
   133→## 4. 컨텍스트 병렬화
   134→
   135→현재 `_collect_context()`에서 일부 컨텍스트 수집이 순차적이다.
   136→`canvas/analyzer.py`의 패턴처럼 `asyncio.gather`로 완전 병렬화:
   137→
   138→```python
   139→results = await asyncio.gather(
   140→    _collect_glossary_context(message, db),      # (str, list[dict])
   141→    _collect_db_context(message, db),             # (str, list[dict])
   142→    _collect_stock_context(message, stocks, db),  # (str, dict, list[dict])
   143→    collect_stock_intelligence(db, ctx, stocks),  # (str, list[dict], dict)
   144→    _collect_stock_lookup_context(message, db),   # (str, list[dict])
   145→    return_exceptions=True,                       # 부분 실패 허용
   146→)
   147→```
   148→
   149→Canvas analyzer에서 이미 이 패턴을 사용 중이며,
   150→Main Agent의 `_collect_context()`에도 동일하게 적용 가능하다.
   151→
   152→### 예상 지연 시간 개선
   153→
   154→| 패턴 | glossary | db | stock | intel | 합계 |
   155→|------|----------|-------|-------|-------|------|
   156→| 순차 | 50ms | 80ms | 200ms | 150ms | 480ms |
   157→| 병렬 | | | | | max(200ms) = 200ms |
   158→
   159→## 5. 프롬프트 캐싱 최적화
   160→
   161→시스템 프롬프트를 정적 prefix + 동적 suffix로 분리하여
   162→OpenAI 자동 프롬프트 캐싱을 활성화한다.
   163→
   164→```
   165→┌────────────────────────────────────┐
   166→│  정적 Prefix (캐싱 대상)            │  ~1500 토큰
   167→│  ├── 역할 정의                      │
   168→│  ├── 난이도별 프롬프트               │
   169→│  ├── 출력 형식 규칙                  │
   170→│  ├── 가드레일 지침                   │
   171→│  └── 차트 생성 규칙                  │
   172→├────────────────────────────────────┤
   173→│  동적 Suffix (매번 다름)             │
   174→│  ├── 용어 컨텍스트                   │
   175→│  ├── DB 사례/리포트                  │
   176→│  ├── 종목 데이터                     │
   177→│  ├── 대화 요약 (Tier 2)             │
   178→│  └── 엔티티 목록 (Tier 3)           │
   179→└────────────────────────────────────┘
   180→```
   181→
   182→정적 prefix가 1024 토큰 이상이면 50-90% 비용 할인 적용.
   183→
   184→## 6. 출력 가드레일
   185→
   186→### 현재: LangGraph + LLM 기반 입력 가드레일
   187→
   188→```python
   189→# guardrail.py — 입력 분류
   190→# 키워드 사전 필터 (즉시, <1ms)
   191→MALICIOUS_KEYWORDS = ["프롬프트", "시스템", "탈옥", "jailbreak", ...]
   192→def _pre_filter(message: str) -> Optional[str]:
   193→    for kw in MALICIOUS_KEYWORDS:
   194→        if kw in msg_lower:
   195→            return "MALICIOUS"
   196→    return None
   197→
   198→# LLM Structured Output (gpt-4o-mini, ~200ms)
   199→structured_llm = llm.with_structured_output(GuardrailClassification)
   200→result = await structured_llm.ainvoke([system, human])
   201→```
   202→
   203→### 목표: 출력 가드레일 (regex 기반, LLM 미호출, <1ms)
   204→
   205→LLM 응답에서 위험 패턴을 regex로 사후 검출:
   206→
   207→```python
   208→import re
   209→
   210→OUTPUT_GUARDRAILS = [
   211→    # API 키/시스템 정보 누출
   212→    (re.compile(r"(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|api[_-]?key\s*[:=])", re.I), "API_KEY_LEAK"),
   213→    # 직접 매수/매도 권유
   214→    (re.compile(r"(지금\s*(바로\s*)?사|빨리\s*매수|무조건\s*매도)", re.I), "DIRECT_ADVICE"),
   215→    # 수익률 보장
   216→    (re.compile(r"(\d+%\s*수익\s*보장|확실히\s*오릅니다|반드시\s*수익)", re.I), "GUARANTEE"),
   217→]
   218→
   219→def check_output(text: str) -> list[str]:
   220→    """출력 텍스트에서 위험 패턴 감지. 감지된 패턴 ID 리스트 반환."""
   221→    violations = []
   222→    for pattern, violation_id in OUTPUT_GUARDRAILS:
   223→        if pattern.search(text):
   224→            violations.append(violation_id)
   225→    return violations
   226→```
   227→
   228→입력 가드레일(LLM)과 출력 가드레일(regex)을 조합하면
   229→LLM 호출 횟수를 줄이면서도 안전성을 유지할 수 있다.
   230→
   231→## 7. 모드 오버라이드 테이블
   232→
   233→프론트엔드 UI 모드와 LLM 라우터의 의도가 충돌할 때의 해소 규칙.
   234→
   235→### UI 모드 정의
   236→
   237→| UI 모드 | 진입 경로 | 기대 동작 |
   238→|---------|----------|----------|
   239→| `home` | 홈 화면 AgentDock | 범용 대화 |
   240→| `stock` | 종목 상세 → AgentDock | 해당 종목 중심 분석 |
   241→| `education` | 교육 페이지 → AgentDock | 학습/용어 설명 |
   242→| `narrative` | 내러티브 페이지 → AgentDock | 사례 심층 분석 |
   243→
   244→### Router 결정 (decision)
   245→
   246→| decision | 동작 |
   247→|----------|------|
   248→| `inline_reply` | AgentDock 내 짧은 텍스트 응답 |
   249→| `inline_action` | 즉시 실행 (매수/매도/네비게이션) |
   250→| `open_canvas` | Canvas 전체 화면 분석 열기 |
   251→| `open_chat` | 멀티턴 대화 모드 전환 |
   252→
   253→### 충돌 해소 매트릭스
   254→
   255→| UI 모드 | LLM 의도 | 최종 결정 | 사유 |
   256→|---------|---------|----------|------|
   257→| home | inline_reply | inline_reply | 일치 |
   258→| home | open_canvas | open_canvas | LLM 판단 존중 |
   259→| stock | inline_reply | inline_reply | 짧은 답변 OK |
   260→| stock | open_canvas | open_canvas | 종목 심층 분석 |
   261→| stock | inline_action (buy) | inline_action | 종목 컨텍스트 있음 |
   262→| education | inline_action (buy) | **inline_reply** | 교육 모드에서 매매 액션 차단 |
   263→| education | open_canvas | open_canvas | 심화 학습 |
   264→| narrative | inline_action | **inline_reply** | 내러티브 모드에서 액션 차단 |
   265→| * | confidence < 0.4 | **inline_reply** | 저신뢰 → 안전한 기본값 |
   266→
   267→### 구현 위치
   268→
   269→`tutor.py`의 `_normalize_route_response()`에서 처리:
   270→
   271→```python
   272→# 신뢰도 임계값 미달 시 강제 inline_reply
   273→if confidence < confidence_threshold:
   274→    decision = "inline_reply"
   275→    action_id = None
   276→    inline_text = "요청을 짧게 처리할게요. 필요하면 캔버스로 이어서 볼 수 있어요."
   277→
   278→# inline_action인데 허용 목록에 없는 action_id → inline_reply 폴백
   279→if decision == "inline_action":
   280→    if not action_id or action_id not in allowed_action_ids:
   281→        decision = "inline_reply"
   282→        action_id = None
   283→```
   284→
   285→### Confidence Threshold
   286→
   287→`settings.TUTOR_ROUTE_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD` 환경변수로 설정.
   288→기본값 0.4. 이 값 미만이면 LLM 판단을 무시하고 `inline_reply`로 강제.
   289→
   290→## 8. 요청 흐름 전체 다이어그램
   291→
   292→```
   293→Client (AgentDock)
   294→    │
   295→    ├── POST /api/v1/agent/route   ← 라우팅 결정 (선택적)
   296→    │       │

# Agent Architecture Reference

에이전트 시스템의 현재 구조, 라우팅 패턴, 가드레일, 모델 전략.

---

## 1. 현재 4-에이전트 암묵 구조

현재 시스템은 명시적 에이전트 분리 없이 4개의 암묵적 역할이
단일 SSE 스트리밍 파이프라인 내에 혼합되어 있다.

```
  사용자 메시지
       │
       ▼
┌──────────────────┐
│  Router Agent    │  tutor.py: _route_with_llm()
│  (gpt-4o-mini)   │  → decision: inline_action | inline_reply | open_canvas | open_chat
└────────┬─────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌──────────────────┐
│  Guardrail Agent │  guardrail.py: run_guardrail()
│  (LangGraph +    │  → SAFE | ADVICE | OFF_TOPIC | MALICIOUS
│   gpt-4o-mini)   │  → keyword pre-filter + LLM structured output
└────────┬─────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌──────────────────┐
│  Main Agent      │  tutor.py: generate_tutor_response()
│  (gpt-5-mini /   │  → context 수집, LLM 스트리밍, DB 저장, 액션 추천
│   gpt-4o-mini)   │
└────────┬─────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌──────────────────┐
│  Viz Agent       │  tutor_chart_generator.py: generate_tutor_chart()
│  (claude-haiku / │  → Plotly JSON 생성 + 7-gate 검증
│   gpt-4o-mini)   │
└──────────────────┘
```

### 현재 문제점

1. **Router와 Main이 분리되지 않음** -- `/agent/chat`은 라우팅 없이 항상 Main 실행
2. **Guardrail이 LLM 호출** -- 모든 요청에 gpt-4o-mini 1회 추가 호출 (~200ms)
3. **컨텍스트 수집이 순차적** -- glossary, DB, stock, intel이 부분적으로만 병렬화
4. **모델 고정** -- 단순 질문도 동일 모델 사용

## 2. 목표: Specialist Routing

Google ADK의 Coordinator/Dispatcher 패턴을 참고하여,
intent별 전문 에이전트로 분기하는 구조.

```
  사용자 메시지
       │
       ▼
┌──────────────────────────┐
│  Intent Classifier       │  regex + keyword (LLM 미호출)
│  → stock_analysis        │
│  → education             │
│  → market_overview       │
│  → simple_chat           │
└────────┬─────────────────┘
         │
    ┌────┼────────┬──────────────┐
    ▼    ▼        ▼              ▼
┌──────┐┌──────┐┌────────────┐┌───────────┐
│Stock ││Edu   ││Market      ││Simple     │
│Agent ││Agent ││Overview    ││Chat Agent │
│      ││      ││Agent       ││           │
│4o    ││4o-mini││4o-mini    ││4o-mini    │
└──────┘└──────┘└────────────┘└───────────┘
```

### Intent Classification

LLM 호출 없이 keyword + regex 기반으로 분류:

```python
def classify_intent(message: str) -> str:
    msg = message.lower()

    # stock_analysis: 종목명/코드 포함
    if detect_stock_codes(message):
        return "stock_analysis"

    # education: 학습/용어 질문
    education_keywords = ["뭐야", "뭔가요", "설명", "알려줘", "의미", "개념", "차이"]
    if any(kw in msg for kw in education_keywords):
        return "education"

    # market_overview: 시장 전반
    market_keywords = ["시장", "코스피", "코스닥", "지수", "전체", "섹터"]
    if any(kw in msg for kw in market_keywords):
        return "market_overview"

    return "simple_chat"
```

## 3. 모델 티어링

intent + 복잡도에 따라 모델을 동적 선택:

| Intent | 기본 모델 | 복잡도 높을 때 |
|--------|----------|---------------|
| simple_chat | gpt-4o-mini | gpt-4o-mini |
| education | gpt-4o-mini | gpt-4o-mini |
| market_overview | gpt-4o-mini | gpt-4o |
| stock_analysis | gpt-4o | gpt-4o |

복잡도 판단 기준:
- 메시지 길이 > 100자
- 종목 2개 이상 비교 요청
- "심층", "자세히", "비교 분석" 등 키워드

```python
def select_model(intent: str, message: str) -> str:
    is_complex = (
        len(message) > 100
        or len(detect_stock_codes(message)) >= 2
        or any(kw in message for kw in ["심층", "자세히", "비교 분석"])
    )

    if intent == "stock_analysis":
        return "gpt-4o"
    if intent in ("market_overview",) and is_complex:
        return "gpt-4o"
    return "gpt-4o-mini"
```

## 4. 컨텍스트 병렬화

현재 `_collect_context()`에서 일부 컨텍스트 수집이 순차적이다.
`canvas/analyzer.py`의 패턴처럼 `asyncio.gather`로 완전 병렬화:

```python
results = await asyncio.gather(
    _collect_glossary_context(message, db),      # (str, list[dict])
    _collect_db_context(message, db),             # (str, list[dict])
    _collect_stock_context(message, stocks, db),  # (str, dict, list[dict])
    collect_stock_intelligence(db, ctx, stocks),  # (str, list[dict], dict)
    _collect_stock_lookup_context(message, db),   # (str, list[dict])
    return_exceptions=True,                       # 부분 실패 허용
)
```

Canvas analyzer에서 이미 이 패턴을 사용 중이며,
Main Agent의 `_collect_context()`에도 동일하게 적용 가능하다.

### 예상 지연 시간 개선

| 패턴 | glossary | db | stock | intel | 합계 |
|------|----------|-------|-------|-------|------|
| 순차 | 50ms | 80ms | 200ms | 150ms | 480ms |
| 병렬 | | | | | max(200ms) = 200ms |

## 5. 프롬프트 캐싱 최적화

시스템 프롬프트를 정적 prefix + 동적 suffix로 분리하여
OpenAI 자동 프롬프트 캐싱을 활성화한다.

```
┌────────────────────────────────────┐
│  정적 Prefix (캐싱 대상)            │  ~1500 토큰
│  ├── 역할 정의                      │
│  ├── 난이도별 프롬프트               │
│  ├── 출력 형식 규칙                  │
│  ├── 가드레일 지침                   │
│  └── 차트 생성 규칙                  │
├────────────────────────────────────┤
│  동적 Suffix (매번 다름)             │
│  ├── 용어 컨텍스트                   │
│  ├── DB 사례/리포트                  │
│  ├── 종목 데이터                     │
│  ├── 대화 요약 (Tier 2)             │
│  └── 엔티티 목록 (Tier 3)           │
└────────────────────────────────────┘
```

정적 prefix가 1024 토큰 이상이면 50-90% 비용 할인 적용.

## 6. 출력 가드레일

### 현재: LangGraph + LLM 기반 입력 가드레일

```python
# guardrail.py — 입력 분류
# 키워드 사전 필터 (즉시, <1ms)
MALICIOUS_KEYWORDS = ["프롬프트", "시스템", "탈옥", "jailbreak", ...]
def _pre_filter(message: str) -> Optional[str]:
    for kw in MALICIOUS_KEYWORDS:
        if kw in msg_lower:
            return "MALICIOUS"
    return None

# LLM Structured Output (gpt-4o-mini, ~200ms)
structured_llm = llm.with_structured_output(GuardrailClassification)
result = await structured_llm.ainvoke([system, human])
```

### 목표: 출력 가드레일 (regex 기반, LLM 미호출, <1ms)

LLM 응답에서 위험 패턴을 regex로 사후 검출:

```python
import re

OUTPUT_GUARDRAILS = [
    # API 키/시스템 정보 누출
    (re.compile(r"(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|api[_-]?key\s*[:=])", re.I), "API_KEY_LEAK"),
    # 직접 매수/매도 권유
    (re.compile(r"(지금\s*(바로\s*)?사|빨리\s*매수|무조건\s*매도)", re.I), "DIRECT_ADVICE"),
    # 수익률 보장
    (re.compile(r"(\d+%\s*수익\s*보장|확실히\s*오릅니다|반드시\s*수익)", re.I), "GUARANTEE"),
]

def check_output(text: str) -> list[str]:
    """출력 텍스트에서 위험 패턴 감지. 감지된 패턴 ID 리스트 반환."""
    violations = []
    for pattern, violation_id in OUTPUT_GUARDRAILS:
        if pattern.search(text):
            violations.append(violation_id)
    return violations
```

입력 가드레일(LLM)과 출력 가드레일(regex)을 조합하면
LLM 호출 횟수를 줄이면서도 안전성을 유지할 수 있다.

## 7. 모드 오버라이드 테이블

프론트엔드 UI 모드와 LLM 라우터의 의도가 충돌할 때의 해소 규칙.

### UI 모드 정의

| UI 모드 | 진입 경로 | 기대 동작 |
|---------|----------|----------|
| `home` | 홈 화면 AgentDock | 범용 대화 |
| `stock` | 종목 상세 → AgentDock | 해당 종목 중심 분석 |
| `education` | 교육 페이지 → AgentDock | 학습/용어 설명 |
| `narrative` | 내러티브 페이지 → AgentDock | 사례 심층 분석 |

### Router 결정 (decision)

| decision | 동작 |
|----------|------|
| `inline_reply` | AgentDock 내 짧은 텍스트 응답 |
| `inline_action` | 즉시 실행 (매수/매도/네비게이션) |
| `open_canvas` | Canvas 전체 화면 분석 열기 |
| `open_chat` | 멀티턴 대화 모드 전환 |

### 충돌 해소 매트릭스

| UI 모드 | LLM 의도 | 최종 결정 | 사유 |
|---------|---------|----------|------|
| home | inline_reply | inline_reply | 일치 |
| home | open_canvas | open_canvas | LLM 판단 존중 |
| stock | inline_reply | inline_reply | 짧은 답변 OK |
| stock | open_canvas | open_canvas | 종목 심층 분석 |
| stock | inline_action (buy) | inline_action | 종목 컨텍스트 있음 |
| education | inline_action (buy) | **inline_reply** | 교육 모드에서 매매 액션 차단 |
| education | open_canvas | open_canvas | 심화 학습 |
| narrative | inline_action | **inline_reply** | 내러티브 모드에서 액션 차단 |
| * | confidence < 0.4 | **inline_reply** | 저신뢰 → 안전한 기본값 |

### 구현 위치

`tutor.py`의 `_normalize_route_response()`에서 처리:

```python
# 신뢰도 임계값 미달 시 강제 inline_reply
if confidence < confidence_threshold:
    decision = "inline_reply"
    action_id = None
    inline_text = "요청을 짧게 처리할게요. 필요하면 캔버스로 이어서 볼 수 있어요."

# inline_action인데 허용 목록에 없는 action_id → inline_reply 폴백
if decision == "inline_action":
    if not action_id or action_id not in allowed_action_ids:
        decision = "inline_reply"
        action_id = None
```

### Confidence Threshold

`settings.TUTOR_ROUTE_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD` 환경변수로 설정.
기본값 0.4. 이 값 미만이면 LLM 판단을 무시하고 `inline_reply`로 강제.

## 8. 요청 흐름 전체 다이어그램

```
Client (AgentDock)
    │
    ├── POST /api/v1/agent/route   ← 라우팅 결정 (선택적)
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   Router (gpt-4o-mini, JSON mode)
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   decision → inline_reply | open_canvas | open_chat | inline_action
    │
    ├── POST /api/v1/agent/chat    ← 메인 대화 (SSE)
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   1. Guardrail (keyword pre-filter → LLM classify)
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   2. Context Collection (asyncio.gather)
    │       ├── glossary DB
    │       ├── historical cases DB
    │       ├── stock prices (pykrx)
    │       ├── stock intelligence
    │       └── stock listings lookup
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   3. LLM Streaming (gpt-5-mini / Responses API)
    │       │ SSE: text_delta, tool_call, guardrail_notice
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   4. Auto Visualization (if stock detected)
    │       │ claude-haiku → gpt-4o-mini fallback
    │       │ 7-gate validation
    │       │ SSE: visualization
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   5. Action Recommendation + Sources
    │       │ SSE: done (actions, sources, structured, model)
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   6. DB Save (session + messages + summary)
    │
    └── POST /api/v1/agent/quick-qa  ← 드래그 선택 즉석 설명
            │
            ▼
        Quick QA (gpt-4o-mini, 150 토큰 제한)
```

    33→## 2. Tier 1: Recent Verbatim Messages

    38→### 현재 구현 (문자 기반 윈도우)
    39→
